title: PLAYFORGE — Indie Game Studio
a11y: Semantic landmarks, focus-visible, prefers-reduced-motion, AA contrast on dark.

summary: Premium dark neon-arcade landing for a game/toys studio: animated hero key-card, 6-game grid with hover, feature cards, trailer showcase, animated stat counters, testimonials, waitlist CTA.
summary_vi: Landing tối phong cách neon-arcade cao cấp cho studio game/đồ chơi: hero key-card động, lưới 6 game có hover, thẻ tính năng, showcase trailer, số liệu chạy động, testimonial, CTA waitlist.
